← All tools

Color Palette Generator

Generate palettes with harmony rules, lock the ones you like and regenerate the rest, extract colors from an image, and check WCAG contrast. Everything runs in your browser.

5 colors Press Space to regenerate · click a swatch to edit

Vision check

Check that neighboring colors still look different.

Gradient

A smooth left-to-right blend of all palette colors.
Drag an image onto the page to extract its colors · a max tool
